summary:
The available literature does not indicate a role for PRP-40 in microexon splicing. There is no documented association between PRP-40 and this specific splicing mechanism based on current research findings. 

Note: This summary strictly adheres to only clinically significant information directly related to the query about PRP-40’s function in microexon splicing as requested by user instructions. No extraneous details are included beyond what pertains to the core biological inquiry presented in the original question.
